name: AssetExclusion: Exclude NetBIOS Name By IP
notes: Blacklists a NetBIOS Name that has been associated with N different V4 IPs over a given period of time.
conditions_text: when the event matches Has Identity is True
when any of Identity Net Bios Name are contained in any of Asset Reconciliation NetBIOS Whitelist - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case), Asset Reconciliation NetBIOS Blacklist - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when at least 3 events are seen with the same Identity Net Bios Name and different Identity IP in 2 hour(s)
thresholds: when at least 3 events are seen with the same Identity Net Bios Name and different Identity IP in 2 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY AssetExclusion: Exclude NetBIOS Name By IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches Has Identity is True

AND NOT when any of Identity Net Bios Name are contained in any of Asset Reconciliation NetBIOS Whitelist - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case), Asset Reconciliation NetBIOS Blacklist - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND when at least 3 events are seen with the same Identity Net Bios Name and different Identity IP in 2 hour(s)
RED_list: Add the "identityNetBiosName" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "Asset Reconciliation NetBIOS Blacklist"
